title: AIDA 3.0 Asset Audit for ai-dev-analytics
summary: Found 981 assets. 945 rules (undefined from cursor auto-generation), 461 duplicate groups, 10 skills, 18 docs. Rules are severely overloaded.

findings.title: 945 rules detected — severe overload
findings.reason: Most rules come from auto-generated cursor _all.md. Many are component tutorials, not hard constraints.

findings.title: 461 duplicate content groups across tools
findings.reason: Same content exists in claude/cursor/codex tool directories.

findings.title: Assets unevenly distributed: cursor=929, aida=18, codex=12, claude=6
findings.reason: Cursor has 929 assets, Claude only 6. Cross-tool alignment needed.

findings.title: Unknown dot-directories: .github, .vscode
findings.reason: These may contain AI tool configs but are not recognized.
findings.recommendedNextStep: Review manually or mark as generic.

nextSteps: Run aida-rules-to-skills skill on component usage rules
Run aida-sync-assets-across-tools skill to align Cursor/Claude/Codex
Open aida dashboard to review proposals
